title: cadaba fruticosa
intro: Cadaba fruticosa, also known as the spiny cadaba, is a small shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Capparaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa, India, and the Middle East. Cadaba fruticosa is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for consumption.
